name: OpenClaw
description: Primary agentic runtime gateway. Message routing, autonomous task execution, organ-aware dispatch, self-healing heartbeats, and self-evolving skill curation. Connects external channels (Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, Signal) to AI agents and the arifOS federation.

skills.name: Agent Dispatch
skills.description: Non-blocking supervised task dispatch to approved internal agents (opencode, hermes-asi, A-FORGE)
examples: dispatch a coding task to opencode
send work to hermes for memory search

skills.name: Agent Handoff
skills.description: Delegation to approved agents through governed handoff workflows
examples: handoff to opencode for feature build
transfer context to hermes for deep recall

skills.name: Status Query
skills.description: Read-only task and run status retrieval

skills.name: Gateway Routing
skills.description: Route messages from external channels to appropriate agents (Telegram groups, DMs, Discord, A2A)

skills.name: Autonomous Probe (NEW v2.0)
skills.description: Self-monitoring heartbeats. Every 5 min probes 8 endpoints (gateway, webhook, 4 MCP organs, Telegram queue, disk) and posts 1-line digest to Telegram if RED. No human request required.

skills.name: Self-Evolve (NEW v2.0)
skills.description: Daily 04:00 MYT scan of installed skills/plugins for staleness, missing updates, disabled capacity. Appends digest to /root/.openclaw/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md and posts to Telegram if updates available.

skills.name: Organ-Aware Routing (NEW v2.0)
skills.description: Routes work to the correct arifOS federation organ: GEOX for earth evidence, WEALTH for capital, WELL for vitality, arifOS for constitutional judgment. Stops routing everything to 'main'.

skills.name: Constitutional Passthrough (NEW v2.0)
skills.description: Routes T2/T3 actions through arifOS MCP arif_judge_deliberate for F1-F13 review before execution. F13 stays as floor (catches you) not gate (asks you).

skills.name: Multi-Agent Spawn (NEW v2.0)
skills.description: Spawn parallel sub-agents via sessions_spawn for independent workstreams. Isolated session context — main session stays clean.
examples: spawn opencode for a code task

skills.name: Session Continuity via L4/L5/L6 (NEW v2.0)
skills.description: Picks up state from arifOS L4 (Supabase), L5 (Graphiti), L6 (VAULT999) memory layers via agent-memory-bridge skill. No re-prompting for known facts.
